title: packera cliffordii
intro: Packera cliffordii, also known as Western Buttercup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Packera cliffordii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Packera cliffordii can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for its herbal benefits, making it a valuable resource in natural remedies.
